goalsSubtitle: Manage goals you move forward day by day
noGoals: No daily goals yet. Create one to begin.
checkinsSubtitle: Manage daily check-ins and must-do items for this week
dashboardSubtitle: Review cumulative progress for each daily goal
dashboardEmpty: No daily goals yet. Create one to see progress here.
weeklyGoalsSubtitle: Review this week’s must-do items and keep the history of past weeks.
weeklyGoalsCurrentWeekEmpty: No weekly goals for this week yet. Create a repeating weekly goal on the right.
weeklyGoalsHistorySubtitle: Review past natural weeks and backfill their completion status.
weeklyGoalsTemplateDeletedHint: This template no longer creates future weekly goals, but this record can still be updated.
weeklyGoalsFormSubtitle: Use this for goals like “what must be finished this week”. The app creates a fresh record every natural week.
weeklyGoalsTitlePlaceholder: For example: Finish this week's project review
weeklyGoalsDescriptionPlaceholder: Add notes, scope, or the completion criteria for this weekly goal
errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errorTargetCount: Target completion count must be an integer greater than or equal to 1.
